working_on.notes: Fixed SplitScreen instability using a Proxy Activity and UI permissions refresh issue.

recent_changes.description: Implemented SplitScreenProxyActivity to resolve background intent restrictions, fixed permission screen refresh, and increased split delays.
Converted Launcher to Standard Overlay App, added AutoStart, SplitScreen fix, Opacity/Scale features, and flat styling.

errors_encountered.error: SecurityException: Permission Denial when calling start from shell on unexported activity
errors_encountered.solution: Activity was internal, only exported for ADB test, now set back to private.

errors_encountered.error: Permission state not refreshing after return from Settings
errors_encountered.solution: Moved mutableStateOf to Activity level and update it in onResume.

errors_encountered.error: SplitScreen opens consecutively rather than adjacently on Head Units
errors_encountered.solution: Invoked Method setLaunchWindowingMode (Primary 3 / Secondary 4) manually via Reflection and wrapped in Proxy Activity.

decisions_made.reason: Avoids Window Token mismatch or 'background start' restrictions when launching two apps in split mode from a floating Service.
